text.title: Freelancer Positioning Content Calendar Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Freelancer with declared pillars (3-5) AND active client work AND weekly commitment?

branch.when: pillars_count >= 3 AND pillars_count <= 5 AND active_clients > 0 AND weekly_cadence_committed == true
